text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 158 

GAP_MONPP_COINS_2M 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 2-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order 
pharmacy within a split network) during the coverage gap phase of
